integrationsSection1.description: Seamlessly integrate Sazzad with the tools you already use. Our platform connects with 100+ popular applications.

featured.title: Shopify Integration
featured.description: Sync your inventory, orders, and products seamlessly between Shopify and Sazzad. Manage everything from one place.

api.title: Custom Integrations with Our API
api.description: Build custom integrations with our robust REST API. Complete documentation, webhooks, and SDKs available.

integrationsSection2.description: Seamlessly integrate Sazzad with the tools you already use. Search and filter to find your favorite apps.

api.title: Powerful API for Custom Integrations
api.description: Build custom integrations with our robust REST API. Complete documentation, webhooks, and SDKs available.
features: SDKs for Python, JavaScript, Ruby, and PHP

integrationsSection3.description: Seamlessly integrate Sazzad with the tools you already use. Browse our extensive library of integrations.

integrations.name: Shopify
integrations.description: Sync your inventory, orders, and products seamlessly between Shopify and Sazzad.

integrations.name: WooCommerce
integrations.description: Connect your WooCommerce store to automate inventory updates and order management.

integrations.name: Magento
integrations.description: Enterprise-grade integration for Magento stores with full inventory sync.

integrations.name: BigCommerce
integrations.description: Seamless integration with BigCommerce for real-time inventory management.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.description: Sync customer data, orders, and inventory with Salesforce CRM.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.description: Connect HubSpot to track customer interactions and sync contact data.

integrations.name: Stripe
integrations.description: Process payments and sync transaction data with Stripe integration.

integrations.name: PayPal
integrations.description: Accept payments and manage transactions through PayPal.

integrations.name: QuickBooks
integrations.description: Sync your financial data with QuickBooks for seamless accounting.

integrations.name: Xero
integrations.description: Connect Xero for automated invoice and expense tracking.

integrations.name: ShipStation
integrations.description: Streamline your shipping process with ShipStation integration.

integrations.name: EasyPost
integrations.description: Multi-carrier shipping integration with EasyPost.

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.description: Get notifications and updates directly in your Slack channels.

integrations.name: Zapier
integrations.description: Connect Sazzad with thousands of apps through Zapier.

integrations.name: Mailchimp
integrations.description: Sync customer data and automate email campaigns with Mailchimp.

integrations.name: Google Analytics
integrations.description: Track and analyze your e-commerce performance with Google Analytics.

integrations.name: SAP
integrations.description: Enterprise-grade integration with SAP for large organizations.

integrations.name: Oracle
integrations.description: Connect Oracle ERP for comprehensive business management.

integrations.name: Microsoft Dynamics
integrations.description: Seamless integration with Microsoft Dynamics 365.

integrations.name: NetSuite
integrations.description: Oracle NetSuite integration for comprehensive ERP management.

api.title: Build Your Own Integration
api.description: Our powerful API lets you create custom integrations with ease. Full documentation, webhooks, and SDKs available.
